actionConfiguration.body:
--[Query: get_meu_perfil]
SELECT id, nome, email, perfil
FROM public.perfis
WHERE id = NULLIF({{(() => { const v = (appsmith.user?.idToken?.sub || appsmith.user?.sub || '').trim(); return /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[1-5][0-9a-f]{3}-[89ab][0-9a-f]{3}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(v) ? v : ''; })()}}, '')::UUID -- Sem aspas!
  AND ativo = TRUE;
